Oracc: CAMS/GKAB — CAMS Geography of Knowledge Corpus

SpTU 1, 011 [incantation against angry gods][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
oo NaN  (start of obverse missing)
o 1'o 1'

[...] ⸢TA?⸣ na-aḫ-lu SA₅-ma [...]

(o 1') You fill [...] with strained [...] ... and you put [...] on the right and left. [...] a censer (full) of juniper. You break (the containers) at the outer gate. [...] as follows.

o 2'2'

[...] ⸢ZA₃⸣ u GUB₃ GARan NIG₂.NA ⸢šim⸣[LI]

o 3'3'

[...] ina KA₂ AN.AŠ.AM₃ tu-ḫap-pa UR₅.⸢GIM⸣ [x x]

o 4'4'

[... ar₂]-⸢nu⸣ pa-ṭi-ir ar₂-nu i-qab-bi-ma šu-šu-⸢rat⸣ [x x]

(o 4') He says '[...] transgression, one who releases transgression' and [...] the sweepings.

o 5'5'

[...] x NIG₂.NA GI.IZI.⸢LA₂⸣ E₂ tuš-[ba-aʾ]

(o 5') [...] .... You move the censer (and) torch through the house.

Reverse
r 1r 1

[...] ZA₃.DU₈ E₂ TAG.TAG-ma I₃.GIŠ I₃ SAG ⸢ZA₃⸣.[DU₈ ...]

(r 1) You smear the door frame of the house [...], and [...] the door frame with oil (and) first-class oil, [...] ... inner and outer [...].

r 22

[...] x bi-ta-nu u KA₂-a-nu [...]

r 33

[...] ⸢TE?⸣-MEŠ-šu₂ DINGIR u d⸢iš₈-tar₂⸣ ze-nu-u₂ KI LU₂ i-⸢sal⸣-[li-mu]

(r 3) [...] will [...] approach him. The angry god and goddess will be at peace with the man.

r 44

[...] DINGIR-MEŠ mu-ši-tu₄ ana ṣi-it pi-[ia]

(r 4) [...], gods of the night. [...] to the utterance of my mouth, gods (and) lords of the silences, Anu (and) Ellil, the great gods, (and) outstanding [...].

r 55

[...] DINGIR-ME EN-ME qu-la₂-a-ti₃ AN d?EN?.LIL₂ DINGIR-MEŠ GAL-MEŠ a-tar [...]

r 66

[...] ⸢qu₂⸣-la₂-a-tu₄ al-si-ki mu-ši-tu₄ kal-lat da-nu₃ na-⸢šat⸣ [x x]

(r 6) [...], silences. I have called on you, night, bride of Anu, imbued with [...].

r 77

[...] ina 15-ia₂ GUBzu

(r 7) [...], stand on my right.

r 88

[...] GUB⸢zu⸣

(r 8) [...], stand [...].

(rest of reverse missing)
